pi_items.source: Downloaded and verified the actual file from official ImageJ repository
Consistent with setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Consistent with setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts
Verifier code confirms requirement: if track_count >= 5, score += 20
Verifier only checks has_motion_data and mean_speed > 0, not specific minimum value. Units unclear (possibly um/s, um/frame, or pixels/frame)

privileged_info_summary: The mitosis.tif image is an official ImageJ sample (33 MB, date: March 2016) downloaded from https://imagej.nih.gov/ij/images/mitosis.tif. It is a 5D hyperstack with 2 channels, 5 Z-slices, 51 time points, and image dimensions of 171x196 pixels. The spatial unit is micrometers and temporal unit is seconds (frame interval ~0.143s). The task requires tracking at least 5 nuclei/chromosomes with motion data present. The data is real (from the official ImageJ repository), not synthetic.
